description: List of three bills of divorce, apparently notes of a court scribe. (1) Husband: Sālim b. Avraham. Wife: [...]b al-Dīn bt. Maṣliaḥ. (2) Husband: David b. Yaʿaqov. Wife: Shams bt. Ḥalfon. (3) Husband: Natan b. Mevorakh ha-Kohen. This one might be followed by a piece of a 4th entry.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
